Semrush Site Audit — mecadrains.com

Website health issues

Semrush crawled mecadrains.com and found 15 total pages. Only 3 are fully healthy. These errors actively suppress search rankings.

Errors
5
critical fixes
Warnings
13
need attention
Healthy pages
3 of 15
only 20%
AI search health
97%
ChatGPT, Perplexity access OK
2 pages returning 404 errors Error
Google stops crawling a site when it hits repeated 4XX errors. This suppresses rankings across all pages, not just the broken ones.
3 broken internal links Error
Broken links waste Google's crawl budget and create dead ends for users. Each broken link is a missed ranking opportunity.
2 pages missing H1 headings Warning
H1 is the primary signal Google uses to understand what a page is about. Pages without it cannot rank well for any keyword.
3 pages with low word count Warning
Google considers thin content a quality issue. These pages need expanded copy targeting service keywords to rank competitively.
7 pages with low text-to-HTML ratio Warning
Most of the page code is formatting rather than real content. Google cannot extract enough text to evaluate keyword relevance on these pages.
Not submitted to Google Search Console
Without Search Console, Google has no direct signal of the site's existence or structure. Submitting the sitemap accelerates indexing and surfaces crawl errors faster. This is a free tool that every site should have set up.
Semrush Position Tracking + Keyword Magic Tool

Keyword rankings & opportunity

mecadrains.com currently ranks for 4 keywords nationally, all branded or hyper-local with low search volumes. The high-value terms that drive calls are entirely unranked.

People search "plumber near me" 450,000 times per month. Advertisers pay $22 per click for that traffic. MECA does not appear in top 100 results for this term. Every day without a presence on these keywords is revenue going to competitors.

Directory & citation health

Google cross-references a business's Name, Address, and Phone (NAP) across the web. Inconsistencies reduce local ranking trust. MECA is only properly listed in 3 of 20+ directories checked.

Note: Some directories may list MECA under a slightly different name or category. The Semrush scan flags these as "not present" when it cannot match exactly. Before creating new listings, check each directory manually to avoid duplicate entries.

Google Ads projection — $1,000/month ad spend

What $1,000/month in ads could return

Based on real CPCs from the Semrush keyword report for this market. Budget split: $600 to Local Services Ads (pay per call) and $400 to Search Ads. Click a scenario to see the breakdown.

Ads check: Based on a search of the Google Ads Transparency Center and a live Google Maps search, it looks like MECA is not currently running any paid ads. Bryant & Sons and Friendly Pro are taking the two sponsored slots above MECA in organic results.
The GBP "Advertise" button leads to Google Smart Campaigns — a simplified auto-managed product. For full control, campaigns should be set up directly at ads.google.com and through the LSA portal.

30-day action plan

What gets done, in order

Prioritized by impact. Technical fixes come first because they affect every other improvement downstream.

1
Fix 2 broken pages and 3 broken internal links Error fix
4XX errors stop Google from crawling the site correctly. Fixing these is the fastest technical SEO gain available and affects all other ranking work.
2
Submit site to Google Search Console Error fix
Submit sitemap.xml to Search Console so Google has a direct signal of the site structure. Surfaces crawl errors faster and accelerates indexing of any new content added.
3
Add H1 headings and expand thin content on 5 pages Warning fix
7 of 15 pages have near-zero rankable content. Adding keyword-rich copy targets 135,000+ monthly searches currently missed entirely.
4
Write and publish GBP business description High priority
Keyword-rich description covering emergency plumber, drain cleaning, Madison Heights, Warren, and surrounding cities. Direct ranking signal missing today.
5
Respond to all 290 reviews, target 90%+ response rate High priority
Review response rate is a direct Google ranking signal. Set up templates for positive and negative responses. Catching up takes under an hour.
6
Submit to 15+ missing directories High priority
Bing Places, YP.com, Yelp, TripAdvisor, HotFrog, EZlocal and more. Consistent NAP across the web builds Google trust. Each directory is checked manually first to avoid duplicates.
7
Fix Facebook and ShowMeLocal address formatting Medium priority
Standardize to "748 W 11 Mile Rd, Madison Heights, MI 48071" across all listings to eliminate NAP inconsistency.
8
Add 15+ photos and start weekly GBP posts Medium priority
Before/after drain job photos, truck, team. One post per week targeting "emergency plumber Madison Heights" and low-difficulty local keywords.
9
Set up Google Local Services Ads Opportunity
Google Guaranteed badge appears above all organic and paid results. Charges per verified call, not per click. Best ROI for a local service business in this market.
Investment
